titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Marazim Ibn Hakim
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Marazim Ibn Hakim

segments: ه عن مرازم بن حكيم فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن مرازم بن حكيم‌.
arabic.text: ه عن مرازم بن حكيم فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن مرازم بن حكيم‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Marazim ibn Hakim has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Marazim ibn Hakim.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Marazim ibn Hakim has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Abi 'Umayr, from Marazim ibn Hakim.
